{{Quote|New-com-ers. You have the ho-nor to prove your-selves. If you are strong-er than me, you are wor-thy of life!|Iponta|<ref name="IC" />}}
'''Gutretee''' were a crystalline [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to [[Isis/Legends|Isis]]. The Gutretee were immune to [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire.

==Society and culture==
Gutretee were an honorable, single-gender race living in primitive nomadic tribes, gaining nourishment from the mineral deposits growing on the surface, and from eating crystalline animals. They were very aggressive in nature; most of their rituals and passage rites involved fighting. Newcomers were often challenged to duels. While these duels were often misconstrued as death matches, they were instead a means of sharing cultural history. The victor earned the right to hear the tribal history of the loser.

===Relationship with the Alliance===
Some tribes were allied with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and worked in the mines helping to provide construction materials, while other tribes hated the Alliance, considering themselves at war with the off-worlders. Decades after [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] arranged for the colonization of Isis, a majority of the Gutretee learned to speak Basic with thick, halting accents.
